creator: mjoyner@wolf.dyns.cx
text:
The interactive port latex2html asks for picture format
	preference (gif or png). selecting png causes port to fail 
	if the user has not previously installed pnmtopng package.

Fix: 

add pnmtopng to the ports dependency list.
How-To-Repeat: 	
	install latex2html when pnmtopng has not been installed
	and specify png as picture format when asked.
